title: Chord Diagram Studio
description: Interactive chord diagram explorer with 5 datasets, hover highlighting, 4 themes, drag-to-rotate, and SVG/PNG export.
concept: A browser-native chord diagram renderer that visualizes mutual relationships between groups — programming languages, music genres, food pairings, tech stacks, and sci-fi universes. Each chord's width encodes connection strength; hover any group to highlight only its ribbons and see exact values. Drag to rotate the entire diagram, switch datasets for smooth fade transitions, and export as crisp SVG or 1600×1600 PNG.
features: 5 curated datasets with symmetric relationship matrices
Hover any group or legend item to highlight connected chords and reveal exact values
Drag-to-rotate the entire diagram to any orientation
4 color themes: Nebula, Ember, Ocean, Sunset
localStorage persistence for dataset, theme, and rotation state

interaction.mouse: Hover group arc or legend item to highlight chords
